ulib_obj_struct
USER_DRAW
W_FORMThis structure groups variables related to handle a formular into a window
W_GRAFPORTThis structure groups informations related to graphic window VDI workstation
W_ICONStructure grouping information related to iconified window
W_MENUThis structure groups variables related to handle a menu into a window

w_version
W_XEDIT
